message:
test(robot): add comprehensive unit tests for tui_parity.go

Add tui_parity_test.go with tests covering:
- Helper functions (100%): detectErrors, parseCodeBlocks,
  extractFileReferences, isLikelyFilePath, truncateString
- PrintPalette (100%): category filter, search query
- PrintDismissAlert (100%): error cases, success cases
- PrintAlertsTUI (55%): nil config, filters, integration
- PrintFiles (44%): time windows, session filter, limit
- PrintMetrics (51%): various periods
- PrintInspectPane (10%): default options, with options
- PrintReplay (29%): missing ID, dry run
- PrintBeadsList (32%): filters, priority normalization
- Bead management (5-8%): missing ID validation, output structures

Helper functions have full coverage. Print* functions have partial
coverage due to external dependencies (tmux sessions, bd/bv tools).

Closes ntm-fdoz
